title: Subway Surfers
blobContent:
<base href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/bubbls/subwaysurfersmerge/">
<html>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" /> 
    <title>Subway Surfers</title>  
    <link rel="icon" href="img/FirstAvatar.png">  
<script src="4399.ss.js"></script>
    <script>
        window.config = {
            loader: "unity",
            debug: false,
            maxRatio: 16 / 9,
            minRatio: 9 / 16,
            title: 'Subway Surfers: Miami',
            unityVersion: '2019.4.18f1',
            unityWebglBuildUrl: 'subway_miami_v1.json',
            fileSize: 31,
            cachedDecompressedFileSizes: {
                'subway_miami_v1.wasm.framework.unityweb':425811,
                'subway_miami_v1.asm.framework.unityweb':444038,
                'subway_miami_v1.asm.memory.unityweb':2703865,
                'subway_miami_v1.wasm.code.unityweb':21971555,
                'subway_miami_v1.data.unityweb':34189276,
                'subway_miami_v1.asm.code.unityweb':55509105,
            },
        };
        window.mergedBlobUrls = {};
        window.assetsReady = false;

        async function mergeSplitFile(fileUrlBase, numParts = 2) {
            const partUrls = Array.from({ length: numParts }, (_, i) => 
                `${fileUrlBase}.part${i + 1}`
            );

            try {
                const responses = await Promise.all(
                    partUrls.map(url => fetch(url))
                );

                if (responses.some(r => !r.ok)) {
                    return null;
                }

                const parts = await Promise.all(
                    responses.map(r => r.arrayBuffer())
                );

                const combinedBlob = new Blob(parts, {
                    type: 'application/octet-stream'
                });

                return URL.createObjectURL(combinedBlob);
            } catch (error) {
                return null;
            }
        }

        function setupXHRInterceptor() {
            if (window.xhrInterceptorInstalled) {
                return;
            }
            
            const originalOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;
            const originalSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send;

            XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(method, url, ...args) {
                this._url = url;
                this._method = method;
                this._args = args;
                
                let finalUrl = url;
                for (const [filename, blobUrl] of Object.entries(window.mergedBlobUrls)) {
                    if (url.includes(filename)) {
                        finalUrl = blobUrl;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                return originalOpen.call(this, method, finalUrl, ...args);
            };

            XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = function(...args) {
                const xhr = this;
                
                if (!window.assetsReady) {
                    const checkReady = setInterval(() => { 
                        if (window.assetsReady) {
                            clearInterval(checkReady);
                            originalSend.apply(xhr, args);
                        }
                    }, 50);
                    return;
                }
                
                return originalSend.apply(this, args);
            };
            
            window.xhrInterceptorInstalled = true;
        }

        async function prepareGameAssets() {
            try {
                window.assetsReady = false;
                delete window.xhrInterceptorInstalled;
                window.mergedBlobUrls = {};
                
                setupXHRInterceptor();
                
                const filesToMerge = [
                    'subway_miami_v1.data.unityweb',
                    'subway_miami_v1.wasm.code.unityweb'
                ];
                 
                for (const filename of filesToMerge) {
                    const blobUrl = await mergeSplitFile(filename, 2);
                    if (blobUrl) {
                        window.mergedBlobUrls[filename] = blobUrl;
                    } 
                }
                
                window.assetsPrepared = true;
                window.assetsReady = true;
                
            } catch (error) {
                window.assetsPrepared = false;
                window.assetsReady = true;
            }
        }

        prepareGameAssets();

    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <script src="master-loader.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

      html,
      body {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0px;
      left: 0px;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      border: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      width: 100vw;
      height: 100vh;
      }
      canvas {
      width: 100%;
      }
    </style>

  </head>

title: Stardew Valley
blobContent:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Stardew Valley | Web Version V1.6.15</title>
<style>
html, body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #000;
}
iframe {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    border: none;
}
#truffled-logo {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 10px;
    right: 10px;
    width: 150px;
    height: 150px;
    cursor: pointer;
    z-index: 9999;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<iframe src="https://truffled.i-creativelearner.com/games/stardew/index.html" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</body>
</html>
